notes: Solid Pong implementation with sweep-based collision detection, AI prediction, ball trail, sound effects, and proper game states; minor issue is the score flash timer being decremented in both updateScored and updatePlaying causing potential double-decrement, but overall very playable and complete.
An exceptionally well-crafted Pong clone with continuous collision detection, predictive AI, custom bitmap fonts, sound effects, and high visual polish.

A solid and polished Pong clone with working game states and controls, but it lacks some expected polish like explicit serve control and has minor logic/UX rough edges that keep it from being near-perfect.
